We build uncompromising
e-commerce architecture.

We eliminate server latency, optimize Core Web Vitals, and migrate stores to modern headless and edge performance architectures. Stop burning your Google Ads budget on slow checkout baskets.

// L-CODE PARTNERS

People Behind The Project

We are an engineering-first team focused deeply on performance optimization and modern design aesthetics. No juniors, no useless meetings — just clean results.

FOUNDER & ARCHITECT

Jan Lančarič

CEO, Headless & UX Architect

Designs headless digital infrastructures and oversees luxury visual art direction. Ensures every project exceeds premium aesthetic guidelines.

CORE ENGINEER

Josef Dlouhý

Technical Partner, Integrations Specialist

Develops robust database sync bridges and oversees ERP integrations. Specialist in optimized data streams, low latency, and security.

// OUR CORE FOCUS

Solutions without speed limits

We design and develop digital monoliths and headless frontends at the edge of the network. Decoupling presentation layers to outperform templates.

01

Edge Performance

Global routing and international caching of static and dynamic assets. Blazing-fast response times and immediate ROAS growth.

02

Headless Front-end

Complete decoupling of the presentation layer. Multi-language and multi-domain store systems with premium global UX without template limits.

03

Custom Full-Stack

Decoupled API connectivity, centralized administration, real-time warehouse sync, ERP bridges, and automated logistic flows.

04

System Bypass

Bending closed platform constraints (Shoptet, Shopify). We implement customized logic that bypasses native platform limitations.

// CLIENT REFERENCES

Projects Built for Absolute Reliability

Our digital solutions process thousands of daily orders and sync millions of data points. Here are selected custom systems we have designed and built:

3D CONFIGURATOR // LUXURY

Aura Design — 3D Configurator & Headless Shopify

Developed a custom 3D furniture configurator and migrated to a headless Shopify storefront. Boosted conversions by 35% and cut LCP to 0.6s.

SYSTEM BYPASS // ENTERPRISE

ElectroHub — Helios ERP to Shoptet API Bridge

Designed and deployed a robust synchronization bridge on Edge Workers. Real-time sync of 150,000+ products and instant order routing.

// INFRASTRUCTURE WITHOUT LIMITS

Infrastructure Without Limits

We do not clone outdated processes. We work with the bleeding-edge technologies powering the modern global web.

Edge Caching
Headless Architecture
Next.js / Nuxt
Custom API Integrations
Serverless Cloud
Shoptet Premium API
Zero-Downtime Deployment
// CASE STUDIES

Results that speak for themselves

Every project is built on measurable outcomes. No promises — just numbers.

// CASE STUDY: FITNESS 77

Fitness 77 — Headless transformation with under 200ms response

For the leading sports nutrition retailer Fitness 77, we designed and implemented a full headless transformation. We replaced the slow template-based store with a robust Next.js frontend hosted on Edge nodes, communicating via Shoptet API. All databases are synced in real-time.

NEXT.JS APP ROUTERSHOPTET APIVERCEL EDGE ENGINEPRISMA CLIENT
SPEED INDEX
0.18s

Average time to first byte (TTFB)

CONVERSIONS
+64%

Conversion rate increase

SERVER TIME
120ms

Edge rendering duration on global CDN

STABILITY
99.9%

Uptime reliability with zero outages

// CASE STUDY: FOTOFILTRY.CZ

Fotofiltry.cz — Custom Next.js storefront & Shoptet Bypass

For photography filter specialist Fotofiltry.cz, we built a complete custom frontend decoupled from Shoptet templates. We implemented advanced product filtering, dynamic categories, and fully synchronized inventory via a custom API bridge. The result: dramatically faster site and a surge in organic traffic.

NEXT.JSSHOPTET BYPASSCUSTOM API BRIDGEEDGE CDN
LCP
0.9s

Largest Contentful Paint after optimization

ORGANIC
+118%

Organic traffic increase

EDGE TIME
98ms

Average response time from Edge servers

UPTIME
99.9%

Continuous uptime with zero outages

What they say about us

Client Reviews

"L-Code Dynamics built us an e-store that finally runs at 100%. The loading speed is incredible and our conversions jumped 30% in the very first month. True professionals."
